جمادى: Jumada (name of two months in the Islamic calendar)
تعارف: to get to know each other
يتعارف: they get to know each other
بلى: yes (in response to a negative question)
احمدي: Ahmadi (related to Ahmad or the Ahmadiyya movement)
عقبال: May it be your turn (to experience something good)
شارف: to be on the verge of
يشارف: he is on the verge of
